title: As Trump Bashes Spain on Military Spending, German Chancellor Merz Piles On
author: Jim Tankersley
fullText: Friedrich Merz has called for greater European unity, but he did not object to the president bashing Spain and Britain in an Oval Office meeting.
summary: Friedrich Merz has called for greater European unity, but he did not object to the president bashing Spain and Britain in an Oval Office meeting.
